$comment: spec: draft well-formed .spec file(s) from a free-text description - the front-end to compose. One request becomes one spec (a single unit) or several (a system, decomposed into units). generate -> write -> done | fix -> rewrite -> done | fail. The oracle is well-formedness: write_specs validates via spec_check and writes atomically (nothing written if any spec is malformed), repairing once. Grounded on patterns/guidelines/pitfalls so the drafted specs name the right concerns. Run: `ratchet flow . spec --ws <proj> "<description>"` then review the specs and `compose`.
summary: Draft well-formed Go build spec(s) from a description (one unit or a whole system), validated and written into a workspace - the front-end to compose.
